text.title: xUnit Testing Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to scaffold and harden an xUnit test suite end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-test-project
step.action: Create `<ProjectName>.Tests` project. Reference xUnit, Moq, FluentAssertions, Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing, Testcontainers, Coverlet.Collector. Mirror production folder layout (`Features/...`).

step.name: write-unit-tests
step.action: For each branch in the SUT, add a `[Fact]` or `[Theory]` named `MethodUnderTest_State_ExpectedBehaviour`. Use `Mock<T>` per dependency; `FluentAssertions` for assertions.
step.decision-gate: If a branch is uncovered, fail per `one-fact-per-branch` rule.

step.name: write-integration-tests
step.action: Add `public partial class Program { }` to production. Implement `IClassFixture<WebApplicationFactory<Program>>`. Replace real external deps via `ConfigureTestServices`.
step.decision-gate: If any test instantiates `new HttpClient()`, fail per `webapplicationfactory-for-integration` rule.

step.name: wire-testcontainers-for-data-layer
step.action: Create `PostgresFixture : IAsyncLifetime` that starts a Testcontainers PostgreSQL container. Share via `ICollectionFixture`. Reset schema between collections via `Respawn`.
step.decision-gate: If any data test uses `UseInMemoryDatabase`, fail per `testcontainers-for-db` rule.

step.name: add-property-tests
step.action: For invariants, add FsCheck.Xunit property tests via `[Property]`. Bound the generator to realistic inputs.

step.name: wire-coverage-gate
step.action: Run `dotnet test --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage"`. Aggregate with ReportGenerator. Fail the build when thresholds drop.
step.decision-gate: If coverage drops below the gate, BLOCK the merge per `coverage-gate-in-ci` rule.
